requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — COPANIT / DGNTI and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——COPANIT / DGNTI 与项目接收
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——COPANIT / DGNTI 與專案接收

summary.en: Panama's standards and conformity context is led by COPANIT and DGNTI under MICI. For solar PV inverters, project owners, EPCs, distributors, and conformity reviewers should be expected to ask for internationally recognizable safety evidence, especially IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test certificates covering the exact inverter model or family. Where COPANIT / DGNTI has adopted or referenced IEC-based standards, the evidence package should map the submitted certificates and reports to those local references.
summary.zh: 巴拿马标准和合格评定背景由 MICI 下属 COPANIT 和 DGNTI 主导。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，项目业主、EPC、配电公司和合格评定审查方通常会要求国际可识别的安全证据，尤其是涵盖具体逆变器型号或系列的 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 型式试验证书。若 COPANIT / DGNTI 已采纳或引用 IEC 基础标准，证据包应将所提交证书和报告映射至这些当地引用。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬標準和合格評定背景由 MICI 下屬 COPANIT 和 DGNTI 主導。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，專案業主、EPC、配電公司和合格評定審查方通常會要求國際可識別的安全證據，尤其是涵蓋具體逆變器型號或系列的 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 型式試驗證書。若 COPANIT / DGNTI 已採納或引用 IEC 基礎標準，證據包應將所提交證書和報告映射至這些當地引用。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
COPANIT / DGNTI standards adoption and conformity context

summary.en: China's common PV inverter documentation may include GB/T 37408 and voluntary CQC or CGC reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These documents may cover safety-related design requirements, but they are China domestic evidence. They should not be presented as automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 or Panama COPANIT / DGNTI conformity expectations without a standards mapping and accepted third-party IEC reports.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器文件可能包括 GB/T 37408 以及来自 CNAS 认可实验室的自愿性 CQC 或 CGC 报告。这些文件可能覆盖安全相关设计要求，但属于中国国内证据。在没有标准映射和可接受第三方 IEC 报告的情况下，不应将其作为 IEC 62109-1/-2 或巴拿马 COPANIT / DGNTI 合格评定预期的自动等效依据。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器文件可能包括 GB/T 37408 以及來自 CNAS 認可實驗室的自願性 CQC 或 CGC 報告。這些文件可能覆蓋安全相關設計要求，但屬於中國國內證據。在沒有標準映射和可接受第三方 IEC 報告的情況下，不應將其作為 IEC 62109-1/-2 或巴拿馬 COPANIT / DGNTI 合格評定預期的自動等效依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: GB/T 37408 safety evidence does not by itself prove IEC 62109-1/-2 compliance for Panama. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports for the specific model, prepare a cross-reference to any COPANIT / DGNTI adopted standard, and confirm whether the project owner or distributor requires an accredited laboratory scope, Spanish summaries, or nameplate / manual changes.
gap.zh: 差距：GB/T 37408 安全证据本身不能证明符合巴拿马所需 IEC 62109-1/-2。出口商应取得特定型号的 IEC 62109-1/-2 型式试验证书和报告，准备与任何 COPANIT / DGNTI 采纳标准的交叉引用，并确认项目业主或配电公司是否要求认可实验室范围、西班牙语摘要或铭牌 / 手册修改。
gap.zht: 差距：GB/T 37408 安全證據本身不能證明符合巴拿馬所需 IEC 62109-1/-2。出口商應取得特定型號的 IEC 62109-1/-2 型式試驗證書和報告，準備與任何 COPANIT / DGNTI 採納標準的交叉引用，並確認專案業主或配電公司是否要求認可實驗室範圍、西班牙語摘要或銘牌 / 手冊修改。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where COPANIT / DGNTI conformity review, distributor acceptance, project-owner specifications, or financing requirements call for IEC-based inverter safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary China domestic safety evidence is useful background but not automatic Panama acceptance

source.publisher: Dirección General de Normas y Tecnología Industrial (DGNTI / MICI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Panama safety file around IEC 62109-1/-2 and map it to any COPANIT / DGNTI adopted standard or project specification. A China GB/T 37408 certificate alone should not be treated as Panama safety acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴拿马安全资料应以 IEC 62109-1/-2 为核心，并映射至任何 COPANIT / DGNTI 已采纳标准或项目规格。仅有中国 GB/T 37408 证书不应视为巴拿马安全接收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴拿馬安全資料應以 IEC 62109-1/-2 為核心，並映射至任何 COPANIT / DGNTI 已採納標準或專案規格。僅有中國 GB/T 37408 證書不應視為巴拿馬安全接收。
